name: XFPM (XyPriss Package Manager)
description: The ultra-fast package manager for the XyPriss ecosystem.
warning: CRITICAL: Public modifications to this file are strictly forbidden. Internal Nehonix metadata ONLY.
message: Sudo Resilience & UX Hardening: Implemented sudo-aware home directory resolution to ensure consistent tool discovery under administrative privileges. Skipped automated JS runtime checks for non-execution commands like 'upgrade' to streamline binary maintenance.
